# EA Sentinel

> Real-time uptime, drawdown and disconnect alerts for your MetaTrader 5 Expert Advisors — straight to Telegram.

EA Sentinel is online at https://mt5monitor.alastor.space/.

## Key pages
- [EA Sentinel](https://mt5monitor.alastor.space/): EA Sentinel page
- [Privacy](https://mt5monitor.alastor.space/privacy): Privacy page
- [Terms](https://mt5monitor.alastor.space/terms): Terms page

## FAQ
### What is EA Sentinel?
Real-time uptime, drawdown and disconnect alerts for your MetaTrader 5 Expert Advisors — straight to Telegram.

### Where can I find EA Sentinel?
EA Sentinel is available at https://mt5monitor.alastor.space/.
